outcome_contract.why: Fresh deployments and CI builds fail silently (500 on every page) when the content generation step is skipped. The materializer warning also means even manual re-runs are unsafe without the trustStrip fix.
outcome_contract.intended_outcome_statement: The Caryina app builds and serves content on fresh checkout without a separate manual generation step; all pages fall back to hardcoded safe content rather than throwing a 500 when the file is absent or malformed.
